metadata.name: agroglobaldex
metadata.description: AgroGlobalDex - Tokenized agricultural RWA marketplace on Solana

instructions.name: buy_external_asset
docs: Buy from a listing whose underlying mint is an EXTERNAL SPL token
curated through `aggregate_external_asset`. Compliance-checked.

instructions.name: init_jurisdiction_policy
docs: Create the on-chain mutable JurisdictionPolicy with conservative defaults.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize the marketplace global config.

accounts.name: compliance_signer
docs: Distinct from `authority` so compliance ops can be delegated to a
service account without touching treasury funds. Can equal authority.

accounts.name: escrow
docs: Escrow token account owned by the listing PDA.

accounts.name: asset_registry
docs: Deterministically reconstructed using the explicit `index` stored
inside the registry itself. No reliance on client-supplied seeds.

instructions.name: register_asset
docs: Register a new tokenizable asset. `product_name` is the human label
e.g. "Viñedo Rioja 2026 Reserva".

instructions.name: set_compliance_signer
docs: Rotate the wallet allowed to stamp KYC. Authority-only.

instructions.name: set_paused
docs: Pause/resume the marketplace circuit breaker. Authority-only.

instructions.name: treasury_withdraw
docs: Authority withdraws accumulated protocol fees (USDC) from the treasury.

instructions.name: update_jurisdiction_policy
docs: Replace both jurisdiction lists in JurisdictionPolicy. Authority-only.

errors.name: UnauthorizedMarketplaceAuthority
errors.msg: Caller is not the marketplace authority

errors.name: UnauthorizedComplianceAuthority
errors.msg: Caller is not the compliance signer

errors.name: UnauthorizedIssuer
errors.msg: Caller is not the asset issuer

errors.name: UnauthorizedCurator
errors.msg: Caller is not the curator of this external asset

errors.name: KycNotVerified
errors.msg: Wallet has not passed KYC verification

errors.name: JurisdictionNotAllowed
errors.msg: Jurisdiction is not allowed by the marketplace policy

errors.name: AccreditedInvestorRequired
errors.msg: Accredited investor status is required for this asset

errors.name: AssetNotRedeemable
errors.msg: Asset is not redeemable

errors.name: SupplyExceeded
errors.msg: Requested amount exceeds the declared total supply

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: ListingUnavailable
errors.msg: Listing is inactive or has insufficient remaining quantity

errors.name: InsufficientFunds
errors.msg: Buyer balance is insufficient to settle the trade

errors.name: PriceOverflow
errors.msg: Price overflow when computing the trade settlement

errors.name: MissingWhitePaper
errors.msg: White paper URI is required for MiCA-regulated assets

errors.name: StringTooLong
errors.msg: Provided string exceeds the maximum allowed length

errors.name: FeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Fee basis points must be <= 1000 (10%)

errors.name: InvalidAssetMetadata
errors.msg: Asset class metadata is invalid or incomplete

errors.name: CrossChainNotTradable
errors.msg: Cross-chain external assets are display-only and cannot be listed

errors.name: MissingExternalMint
errors.msg: External asset does not declare an SPL mint

errors.name: ListingMismatch
errors.msg: Listing source/mint mismatch

errors.name: InvalidUsdcMint
errors.msg: USDC mint does not match the marketplace USDC mint

errors.name: ExternalAssetInactive
errors.msg: External asset is not currently active

errors.name: InvalidAggregatorPayload
errors.msg: Aggregator payload incomplete or inconsistent

errors.name: InvalidYield
errors.msg: Expected yield must be <= 5000 bps (50%)

errors.name: InvalidMaturity
errors.msg: Maturity must be a future Unix timestamp

errors.name: InvalidDuration
errors.msg: Duration must be between 1 and 120 months

errors.name: TooManyJurisdictions
errors.msg: Too many jurisdictions in the policy list (max 32)

errors.name: Paused
errors.msg: Marketplace is paused — write operations are temporarily disabled

types.name: AggregatePayload
docs: Off-chain payload for aggregator entries. Bundled into a single struct so
it can be serialized cleanly across the IX boundary and the IDL stays tidy.

types.name: AssetClass
docs: Top-level asset classes supported by the marketplace. Each carries
class-specific metadata that the off-chain certificate (referenced through
`oracle_attestation`) must back.

fields.name: product_kind
docs: What is being tokenized (vineyard, olive grove, livestock…).

fields.name: duration_months
docs: Investment lock-up in months. Bounded 1..=120.

fields.name: expected_yield_bps
docs: Expected yield in basis points (e.g. 900 = 9% target ROI).
Capped at 5000 bps (50%) — anything higher is almost certainly
a misconfigured input and would invite obvious abuse.

fields.name: maturity_unix_ts
docs: Unix timestamp (seconds) at which the off-chain redemption is
expected to settle. MUST be > `Clock::now` at registration.

fields.name: sector
docs: Top-level sector classification (Meat, Wine, Oil, Dairy, ...).

fields.name: sub_kind
docs: Opaque sub-classification within the sector. Interpreted by the
frontend. E.g. for `Meat`: 0=Beef, 1=Pork, 2=Poultry, 3=Lamb,
4=Fish, 255=Other. For `Wine`: 0=Red, 1=White, 2=Rose, 3=Sparkling.

fields.name: origin_country
docs: ISO-3166 alpha-2 country code of origin (e.g. "AR", "ES", "BR").

fields.name: vintage_year
docs: Year of production / vintage.

fields.name: grams_per_token
docs: How many grams of the physical commodity each token base unit
represents. e.g. `1000` = each token (1 base unit at 6 decimals,
so 1.000000) is 1 kg. For liquids (wine/oil/milk) use grams equiv
or convert in the certificate.

fields.name: redeemed_at
docs: The off-chain settlement workflow MUST listen to this event and release
the physical commodity (or retire the credit) to `holder`.

types.name: AssetRegistry
docs: One per tokenized real-world asset lot. The mint of the SPL Token-2022 is
derived from this registry as a PDA so the program is its mint authority.

fields.name: marketplace
docs: The marketplace this asset belongs to.

fields.name: issuer
docs: Issuer (producer / cooperative / project) wallet. Only they can mint.

fields.name: mint
docs: The SPL Token-2022 mint that represents this asset.

fields.name: asset_class
docs: Class + class-specific metadata.

fields.name: total_supply
docs: Maximum tokens that may ever be minted against this lot.

fields.name: minted_supply
docs: Amount minted so far.

fields.name: oracle_attestation
docs: SHA-256 of the off-chain attestation (warehouse receipt, VCS issuance, etc).

fields.name: white_paper_uri
docs: MiCA Art. 6 white paper URI (IPFS / Arweave preferred).

fields.name: metadata_uri
docs: Off-chain JSON metadata URI (image, full description).

fields.name: product_name
docs: Human-friendly product label, e.g. "Viñedo Rioja 2026 Reserva".

fields.name: redeemable
docs: Whether burning tokens redeems the underlying off-chain commodity.
Carbon credits, for example, are typically redeemable (retirement).
For `InvestmentOffering` this is `false` (settlement is off-chain).

fields.name: frozen_metadata
docs: True once the issuer has minted at least once and no more changes to
immutable fields are allowed.

fields.name: index
docs: Sequential index assigned by the marketplace at registration time.
Used as a seed component so PDA seeds are deterministically
reconstructible without trusting the client.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for this PDA.

types.name: ComplianceRecord
docs: One per wallet. Stamped by the marketplace `compliance_signer`.

fields.name: wallet
docs: The wallet this record refers to.

fields.name: marketplace
docs: Marketplace the record is scoped to (multi-tenant friendly).

fields.name: kyc_verified
docs: True if the wallet has passed KYC.

fields.name: jurisdiction
docs: ISO-3166-alpha-2 country code (e.g. "AR", "DE").

fields.name: accredited_investor
docs: Whether the wallet qualifies as an accredited / professional investor
under MiFID II / MiCA categorization.

fields.name: updated_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the record was last updated.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for this PDA.

types.name: ExternalAssetRegistry
docs: One per third-party (aggregated) token. Curated by the marketplace
authority.

fields.name: marketplace
docs: Marketplace that aggregates this asset.

fields.name: curator
docs: Wallet that submitted the curation (normally `marketplace.authority`).

fields.name: mint
docs: Solana SPL mint, if the token is native to Solana.

fields.name: external_chain_id
docs: Free-form chain identifier for cross-chain assets.

fields.name: external_contract
docs: Contract address on the foreign chain. Empty if `mint` is set.

fields.name: asset_class
docs: Reuse the same asset taxonomy as native assets.

fields.name: source_platform
docs: Short label for the upstream platform.

fields.name: source_url
docs: URL pointing at the upstream platform listing / explorer.

fields.name: metadata_uri
docs: Off-chain JSON metadata URI.

fields.name: verified
docs: Curator-verified flag (independent of on-chain validation).

fields.name: active
docs: Whether this aggregated asset is currently visible/tradable.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Creation timestamp.

fields.name: index
docs: Sequential index assigned at aggregation time.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for this PDA.

types.name: JurisdictionPolicy
docs: On-chain mutable jurisdiction policy. One per marketplace. Authority-only.
The compliance-hook program and `buy_asset` both read this account to
determine which jurisdictions are blocked outright and which additionally
require accredited-investor status (irrespective of asset class).

fields.name: blocked
docs: Hard-blocked ISO-3166-alpha-2 codes (e.g. "KP", "IR", "SY", "CU").
Wallets in these jurisdictions cannot transact at all.

fields.name: requires_accredited
docs: Jurisdictions that require `accredited_investor == true` regardless
of asset class.

types.name: ListingSource
docs: A listing in the marketplace can either reference a native `AssetRegistry`
(tokens minted by this program) or an aggregated `ExternalAssetRegistry`
(tokens minted by another platform but listed here for trading).

types.name: Marketplace
docs: Global marketplace configuration. One per deployment.

fields.name: authority
docs: Wallet that controls marketplace parameters: fee_bps, treasury
withdrawals, aggregator entries. Can be a human wallet OR a Squads
(or any other) multisig PDA — the program is agnostic.

fields.name: compliance_signer
docs: Wallet permitted to stamp `ComplianceRecord`s. Distinct from
`authority` so a compliance bot / service account can operate
without ever touching treasury funds. Rotated via
`set_compliance_signer` (authority-only).

fields.name: compliance_authority
docs: PDA derived from [COMPLIANCE_AUTHORITY_SEED, marketplace] — kept for
backwards compatibility / future use as a CPI signer over hook
programs. Currently informational.

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC SPL mint used to settle trades. Stored on the marketplace so we
can swap mainnet/devnet without changing program code.

fields.name: treasury
docs: PDA that owns the USDC treasury ATA where fees accumulate.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for the marketplace PDA.

fields.name: compliance_bump
docs: Bump for the compliance authority PDA.

fields.name: treasury_bump
docs: Bump for the treasury PDA.

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Fee charged on each buy, in basis points (e.g. 50 = 0.5%).

fields.name: asset_count
docs: Monotonic counter of native registered assets.

fields.name: external_asset_count
docs: Monotonic counter of external (aggregated) registered assets.

fields.name: paused
docs: Circuit breaker. When `true`, all write paths abort with `Paused`.

types.name: MarketplaceListing
docs: A fixed-price USDC listing of `remaining` tokens of the underlying mint.

fields.name: source
docs: Discriminator for `source_registry`.

fields.name: source_registry
docs: Either an `AssetRegistry` PDA or an `ExternalAssetRegistry` PDA.

fields.name: mint
docs: The actual SPL mint being traded (same as either
`AssetRegistry.mint` or `ExternalAssetRegistry.mint`).

fields.name: escrow
docs: Escrow ATA (owned by the listing PDA) that holds the tokens for sale.

fields.name: price_usdc
docs: Price in USDC base units (6 decimals) per single base-unit of the token.

fields.name: remaining
docs: Remaining quantity available for sale.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Listing creation timestamp.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for this PDA.

fields.name: active
docs: Whether the listing is still active.

types.name: ProductKind
docs: Kinds of `InvestmentOffering` products the marketplace tokenizes.

types.name: Sector
docs: Top-level sectors for `AssetClass::Commodity`. Cubre los casos de uso 1
del modelo de negocio: tokenizar kg/litros de cualquier producto agro
físico.
